name: GolfLoft Keene
about: GolfLoft Keene is an indoor golf facility that uses AboutGolf simulators to offer access to over 85 virtual courses. It caters to golfers of all skill levels with 24/7 access for members and hourly rentals for non-members. The venue features PGA professional instruction, PING club fitting services, and a relaxed clubhouse atmosphere. The Golf Loft provides a space for practice, league play, and events, equipped with modern technology including 32-inch TVs on each simulator.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for flexible practice and play times
Licensed PING fitter and regripping services for club customization
Multiple simulator bays available with entertainment TVs

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, bringing outside food and drinks is permitted
BYOB allowed, bringing outside alcohol is permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: 85+ course simulator system used for all virtual golf experiences

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. Club rentals are not mentioned as an available service.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB, meaning you can bring your own food and alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for 18 holes, but with 24/7 access and flexible booking, you can take as much time as needed.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a special junior rate of $60 per hour and is open to golfers of all skill levels, making it suitable for kids.
